questions.answer: D) @RestController

questions.question: According to the article, which of the following is a primary advantage of using lazy loading?
options: It ensures all related data is pre-loaded instantly, improving initial user experience.
It significantly reduces initial page load time and memory footprint by deferring object initialization.
It simplifies debugging by ensuring all dependencies are available from the start.
It always guarantees faster access to all resources regardless of user interaction speed.
questions.answer: B) It significantly reduces initial page load time and memory footprint by deferring object initialization.

questions.question: What is a main disadvantage of using setter injection for dependencies compared to constructor injection?
options: Setter injection is less reliable as it doesn't guarantee a dependency is injected, potentially leading to incomplete objects.
Setter injection allows for partial dependency injection, which is always undesirable.
Setter injection cannot override constructor injection, making it less flexible.
Setter injection makes the class more tightly coupled to its dependencies.
questions.answer: Setter injection is less reliable as it doesn't guarantee a dependency is injected, potentially leading to incomplete objects.
